questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Select the correct statement(s) about the compound $\mathrm{NO}\left[\mathrm{BF}_4\right]$ :
options: Nitrogen-oxygen bond length is higher than in nitric oxide (NO)
$B-F$ bond length in this compound is lower than in $\mathrm{BF}_3$
questions.solution:
$\mathrm{NO}^{+}\left[\mathrm{BF}_4\right]^{-}$
No. of $\sigma$ bonds in $\left[\mathrm{BF}_4\right]^{-}=4$ B.O. of $\mathrm{NO}^{+}=3.0$, i.e., one sigma bond and two $\pi$ bonds $\therefore \quad$ No. of $\pi$ bonds $=2$ No. of $\sigma$ bond $=5$ B.O. of $\mathrm{NO}^{+}=3.0$ and B.O. of $\mathrm{NO}=2.5$ $\Rightarrow \mathrm{NO}^{+}$is diamagnetic and $\mathrm{BF}_4^{-}$is also diamagnetic $B-\mathrm{F}$ bonds are longer in $\mathrm{BF}_4^{-}$than in $\mathrm{BF}_3$ due to absence of $\mathrm{p} \pi-\mathrm{p} \pi$ back bonding in $\left[\mathrm{BF}_4^{-}\right]$.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
options: Bond angle in $\mathrm{Cl}_2 \mathrm{O}$ is greater than $109^{\circ} 28^{\prime}$
Bond angle in both cases are $\left.109^{\circ} 28\right]$
questions.solution: Hybridisation of O -atom in both $\mathrm{OF}_2$ and $\mathrm{OCl}_2$ is $s p^3$. Bond angle in $\mathrm{OF}_2$ is less than $109^{\circ} 28^{\prime}$ because F is more electronegative than O whereas it is more than $109^{\circ} 28^{\prime}$ in $\mathrm{OCl}_2$ becuase O is more electronegative than Cl .
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
